description: Create an IDEF0 Context Diagram (Node A-0) in EdrawMax for a 'Process Customer Order' function. The diagram must feature a central function box labeled 'Process Customer Order' with interface arrows following IDEF0 spatial rules: 'Purchase Order' (Input/Left), 'Credit Policy' and 'Inventory Rules' (Control/Top), 'Confirmed Invoice' and 'Pick List' (Output/Right), and 'Order Management System' and 'Sales Associate' (Mechanism/Bottom). Include the title 'Node A-0: Order Processing Context' at the bottom of the diagram. Save the editable file to /home/ga/Documents/idef0_order_process.eddx and export a PNG image to /home/ga/Documents/idef0_order_process.png.
